# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.754 — Scope of Project

If an environmental review document is prepared by a local government sponsor, the local government sponsor must prepare a detailed scope of the project in collaboration with the department before the department may process the environmental review document.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 21(a), eff. September 1, 2011.*
